title: lithospermum officinale subsp. erythrorhizon
intro: Lithospermum officinale subsp. erythrorhizon, also known as the red root, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to East Asia and North America. The medicinal properties of Lithospermum officinale subsp. erythrorhizon include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Lithospermum officinale subsp. erythrorhizon can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make teas and tinctures.
